nodes.label: Operation State
nodes.source:
struct OperationState {
    operation_name: String,
    attempts: usize,
    errors_encountered: Vec<String>,
    recovered: bool,
    final_status: OperationStatus,
}

nodes.label: Check Permission
Create Comment

Run Error Handling Examples
